outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to positive GEX, expect price pinning between 670 and 675.
outlook.summary: Market is in a high positive GEX environment, leading to suppressed volatility and mean-reverting behavior. Price is capped by a massive 675 Resonance Call Wall across all expirations while being magnetized by the 0DTE Max Pain at 670.

levels.motivazione: Resonance level with massive Call OI in 0DTE (4.8k), WEEKLY (29.8k), and MONTHLY (24.5k). Spot is right at this level, creating an impenetrable intraday ceiling.
Confluence level with massive Put OI in WEEKLY (79.8k) and MONTHLY (37.2k). Acts as ultimate structural support.
Confluence of significant Call OI in WEEKLY (7.3k) and MONTHLY (24.4k). Secondary ceiling if 675 is breached.
Monthly Gamma Flip level. Shifts dealer hedging from long to short gamma below this point, accelerating downside moves.
0DTE Max Pain level combined with high Put OI (9.5k). High probability of price attraction towards this strike by end of day.
Highest 0DTE Put OI (9.9k). Immediate intraday structural support level below Gamma Flip.
